contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/budget_function/count.md
contract.description: Counts budget functions and sub-functions for a specified agency toptier code in a fiscal year.

toptier_code.description: Identifier for the toptier agency (CGAC or FREC). Must be 3-4 digit characters.
toptier_code.constraints: Required; digits only; 3-4 characters; non-matching formats return HTML 404.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year to evaluate. Defaults to the current fiscal year when omitted or blank.
fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; accepts integers between 2008 and 2026 inclusive; blank strings are treated as omitted; leading zeros normalized; values above current FY yield 422; values below 2008 yield 422; non-integer values return 400.

toptier_code.description: Echoes the agency toptier code used for the request.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year that the counts represent; defaults to current FY when not provided.

budget_function_count.description: Number of distinct budget functions tied to the agency for the fiscal year.

budget_sub_function_count.description: Number of distinct budget sub-functions tied to the agency for the fiscal year.

messages.description: Array of warning or informational strings; empty for fully supported years and includes DATA Act availability notice for FY < 2017.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: IPv6 requests closed without response during testing; forcing IPv4 (curl -4) consistently succeeded.
Supplying an empty query value for fiscal_year defaults back to the current fiscal year.
Leading zeros in fiscal_year are accepted and normalized in the response.
Non-digit toptier_code paths (e.g., 'abc') return an HTML 404 page, while unknown numeric codes return JSON 404 bodies.
messages array includes a historical data availability warning when requesting fiscal years before DATA Act coverage.

probes.notes: fail - Server closed IPv6 connection without sending a response; retried with IPv4.
pass - Default request targets current fiscal year (2026) with counts and empty messages.
pass - Explicit fiscal year parameter accepted and echoed.
pass - Different toptier code returns different counts as expected.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"097","fiscal_year":2010,"budget_function_count":0,"budget_sub_function_count":0,"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass - Pre-DATA Act year returns zeros with explanatory message.
fail - Non-numeric toptier path does not match route and returns HTML 404.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Agency with a toptier code of '999' does not exist"}

probes.notes: fail - Numeric but unknown toptier code returns JSON 404 detail.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. 'foo' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: fail - Non-integer fiscal_year rejected with 400 validation error.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. '2023.5' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: fail - Decimal fiscal_year is disallowed.
fail - Two-digit toptier code not accepted; route expects 3-4 digits.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"012","fiscal_year":2016,"budget_function_count":0,"budget_sub_function_count":0,"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass - FY 2016 still prior to DATA Act and returns warning.
fail - Values above current FY are rejected with explicit max message.
pass - Explicit current FY matches default output.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"097","fiscal_year":2015,"budget_function_count":0,"budget_sub_function_count":0,"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass - Another pre-DATA Act year yields same warning pattern.
pass - Four-digit FREC toptier supported and returns counts.
fail - Fiscal years below 2008 rejected with explicit min message.
pass - Empty fiscal_year query string is treated as omitted and defaults to current FY.
pass - Leading zeros accepted and normalized in response.
fail - Encoded space in toptier path breaks routing and returns HTML 404.
fail - Fiscal year 2027 rejected confirming dynamic upper bound.
fail - Fiscal year below 2008 min rejected with 422.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"012","fiscal_year":2008,"budget_function_count":0,"budget_sub_function_count":0,"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass - Minimum accepted year returns zeros and the DATA Act warning.
pass - First DATA Act coverage year has counts and no warnings.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. 'null' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: fail - Literal string 'null' rejected as invalid type.
pass - Another agency returns counts for current FY verifying per-agency variance persists.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"1601","fiscal_year":2008,"budget_function_count":0,"budget_sub_function_count":0,"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass - FREC code exhibits same minimum-year warning.

mismatches: Contract lists the request schema as a bare number, but the live API uses a RESTful GET with path and query parameters and no numeric body.
Docs describe toptier_code as a number, yet the live service requires a 3-4 digit string and returns HTML 404 for non-digit formats.
gaps: Unverified whether any responses include multiple distinct messages beyond the DATA Act availability warning.
Not confirmed if the fiscal year bounds update automatically at the start of a new fiscal year without downtime.
risks: Clients connecting over IPv6 may receive empty replies and should fall back to IPv4.
Error payload format varies: some 404s are HTML rather than JSON, so clients must defensively parse failures.
Fiscal year bounds are enforced server-side; integrations should handle annual updates when the max fiscal year advances.

added: Documented exact fiscal_year bounds (2008-2026) with explicit 422 responses and blank-string behavior.
Captured pass-2 probes for min/max fiscal years, DATA Act threshold, string 'null', and cross-agency verification with meta markers.
changed: Promoted contract and schema confidence to observed and noted array item typing for messages.
